_meta.description: Global optimizations applied to all profiles - Safe for all users
_meta.author: Julien Bombled

Network.DnsNotes: Primary: Quad9 (9.9.9.9), Secondary: Cloudflare (1.1.1.1), Fallback: Google (8.8.8.8)

Notes: These optimizations are safe for all users
Services are set to Manual (not disabled) when possible
Windows Search stays available but won't auto-start
Cortana is disabled as it's obsolete with modern AI
Bloatware suggestions and tips are disabled
Security: Defender and Firewall remain active
DNS: 3 providers for redundancy (Quad9, Cloudflare, Google)
